backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Inner Bloom app defining core data types (Book, JournalEntry, UserProfile, MeditationSession, etc.) and initializing a static book list, with mixins for blob storage and authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their relevant source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for UI layout and component refactoring tasks.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, hook, and configuration file in the project.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md: Step-by-step runbook for redeploying the Inner Bloom app without code changes, covering prerequisites and standard redeploy steps.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_TROUBLESHOOTING.md: Structured troubleshooting template for diagnosing deployment failures across each stage from dependency installation through runtime/browser errors.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file defining Tailwind base/components/utilities and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app that sets the page title, favicon, a process.env compatibility shim, and global error/unhandledrejection handlers for runtime diagnostics.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, dashboard, pre-meditation, progress, journal, books, knowledge) and wraps the app in AppErrorBoundary, ThemeProvider, and ThemedToaster.
frontend/src/components/AmbientMusicCaro: A carousel component for selecting and playing ambient background sounds, with controls for navigation, mute toggle, and volume adjustment via a slider.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: A React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors and displays a detailed error message, stack trace, and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/CloudSyncErrorBa: An alert banner component that displays cloud sync or data-loading errors with contextual messages based on error type and a retry button.
frontend/src/components/DurationRangeInp: A labeled slider input component for selecting a session duration in minutes, with configurable min/max bounds and a step of 5.
frontend/src/components/FeatureCard.tsx: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/FloatingNav.tsx: A fixed left-side floating navigation bar with icon buttons for Journal, Progress, Books, and Knowledge routes, with hover tooltips and animated float effect.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A mobile hamburger menu (Sheet) providing theme toggle, account status display, logout functionality, and navigation back to the start page.
frontend/src/components/JournalFiltersDr: A filter panel for journal entries supporting multi-select mood and energy filters, date range inputs, text search, and a favorites toggle, with an active filter count indicator.
frontend/src/components/KnowledgeBookPag: A paginated book-style component for displaying knowledge content pages with swipe, keyboard, and dot navigation support. Handles slide animations, scroll-to-content behavior, and resets to the first page when the category changes.
frontend/src/components/KnowledgeCategor: A carousel component for selecting knowledge categories, showing the selected item centered with adjacent items partially visible. Supports swipe gestures, keyboard arrow keys, and circular navigation.
frontend/src/components/KnowledgeQuizDia: A modal dialog that presents a shuffled multiple-choice quiz for a knowledge category, tracking per-question answers and allowing back-navigation. Displays a results summary on completion with an option to retake.
frontend/src/components/lotus-r3f/LotusM: Renders an animated 3D lotus flower using React Three Fiber, with petals, stem, and a center glow mesh that respond to a `LotusGrowthState` (breathing, bloom openness, vividness) and theme-based colors.
frontend/src/components/lotus-r3f/LotusP: Renders an animated particle system around the lotus using Three.js Points, switching between chaotic Brownian motion and coherent orbital patterns based on `LotusGrowthState.particleCoherence`.
frontend/src/components/LotusCanvas.tsx: A full-screen canvas animation rendering an animated lotus flower with floating particles, adapting opacity and glow intensity based on theme (dark/light) and variant/intensity props. Uses requestAnimationFrame for a continuous breathing/pulsing effect.
frontend/src/components/MeditationCarous: A carousel for selecting a meditation type from a fixed list, displaying the selected card centered with adjacent cards partially visible. Supports touch swipe gestures and circular prev/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/MeditationGuideS: A multi-step stepper component for displaying meditation guide steps with forward/backward navigation, dot indicators, swipe gesture support, and optional Benefits section rendering.
frontend/src/components/MeditationTimerR: A Canvas-based animated timer ring component that renders a circular progress arc with a wave effect and glowing edge, theme-aware colors, using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/MeditationWaveFi: A Canvas-based circular indicator that animates a rising wave fill from bottom to top based on a 0–1 progress value, with theme-aware colors and a circular border.
frontend/src/components/MindfulnessGuide: Renders a guided meditation walkthrough using MeditationGuideStepper for four meditation types (mindfulness, metta, visualization, ifs), each with predefined multi-step content.
frontend/src/components/MobileBackButton: A mobile-only fixed back button that navigates to the dashboard, optionally calling a custom onBack handler before navigating.
frontend/src/components/PageBackgroundSh: A layout shell component that wraps page content with a full-screen background and renders a LotusCanvas with configurable variant and intensity.
frontend/src/components/ProgressBowl.tsx: A Canvas-based animated bowl component that fills with a liquid wave effect proportional to total meditation minutes (capped at 20,000), with theme-aware glow and color styling.
frontend/src/components/ProgressLotusR3F: A React Three Fiber scene that renders a 3D lotus model with particles and auto-rotating orbit controls, with growth state derived from total meditation minutes.
frontend/src/components/ProgressLotusSVG: Renders an animated SVG lotus flower whose petal count, openness, color vividness, and glow intensity are driven by total meditation minutes and current streak, with a continuous breathing/pulse animation loop.
frontend/src/components/QuizDialog.tsx: A multi-step dialog that presents 5 questions to determine a recommended meditation type (mindfulness, metta, visualization, or IFS) based on the user's answers, then reports the result via a callback.
Displays a post-meditation reflection form where users can select moods, energy level, write a free-text reflection, and mark the session as a favorite before saving.
frontend/src/components/RitualSelectionM: A dialog modal that lists up to 5 saved meditation rituals in a carousel and lets the user start or delete a ritual.
frontend/src/components/SavedRitualsCaro: A swipeable/navigable carousel component that displays saved ritual cards with meditation type and ambient sound details, supporting start and delete (with confirmation dialog) actions.
frontend/src/components/SessionIndicator: A fixed top-left indicator that shows whether the user is authenticated or browsing as a guest, providing login navigation or logout functionality with query cache cleanup.
A reusable page navigation bar that renders a back button, theme toggle, session indicator (desktop), and hamburger menu (mobile) with consistent positioning across pages.
frontend/src/components/ThemedToaster.ts: A thin wrapper that renders the Sonner Toaster component with a close button for app-wide toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloudOperation.ts: Composition hook that exposes a `runCloudWriteWithRetry` helper, wrapping cloud operations with readiness-aware retry logic using the current actor and identity via refs.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useMeditationTimer.ts: Custom hook managing a countdown meditation timer with start, pause, reset, seek, and duration-change capabilities, firing an `onComplete` callback when time reaches zero.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend data operations (books, quotes, journal entries, meditation sessions, rituals, progress stats, user profile, and import/export), with guest-mode fallbacks using local storage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Playfair Display font, sets up Tailwind CSS, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and declares custom utility animations (fade-in, breathe, glow-pulse, float, wave).
frontend/src/lib/bookData.ts: Defines the BookWithAmazon interface and exports a static array of seven meditation/mindfulness book recommendations, each with title, author, description, Amazon link, tags, and icon.
frontend/src/lib/knowledgeContent.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for quiz questions and technique content, then exports a TECHNIQUE_CONTENT array containing detailed multi-page educational content and quizzes for meditation techniques like mindfulness.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, mounting it to the root DOM element.
Renders the active meditation session UI, including a wave-fill timer display, play/pause button, volume slider, and time-seek slider, accepting all session state and callbacks as props.
frontend/src/pages/BookRecommendationsPa: Displays a carousel of book recommendations with swipe/touch support, circular navigation, and stacked card animations, pulling data from the static BOOK_RECOMMENDATIONS list.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays a meditation type carousel, daily quote, and begin button, with support for quiz-based recommendations, ritual selection/deletion, and navigation to the pre-meditation flow.
frontend/src/pages/JournalPage.tsx: Journal page that lists meditation session entries with filtering, inline editing, favorite toggling, deletion, and import/export functionality, supporting both authenticated and guest modes.
frontend/src/pages/KnowledgePage.tsx: Knowledge base page that renders meditation technique content via a category carousel and book pager, with per-category quiz support and persistent score tracking keyed by user identity.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with Internet Identity login and guest mode entry, featuring an animated lotus canvas background, theme toggle, and automatic redirect to the dashboard for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/PreMeditationPage.tsx: Multi-phase meditation flow page covering setup (mood, energy, duration, ambient sound), active meditation timer, and post-session reflection, with session recording, journal entry creation, and ritual saving.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: Displays the user's meditation progress stats (total minutes, streak, rank) with export/import functionality and a confirmation dialog for data overwrite.
frontend/src/utils/ambientSounds.ts: Defines a static list of ambient sound options (id, name, icon, audio path) and provides helper functions to look up sounds by ID.
frontend/src/utils/cloudSync.ts: Provides standardized cloud sync error constants, a function to map raw backend errors to user-friendly messages, and a utility to classify error types (auth, readiness, network, etc.).
frontend/src/utils/cloudSyncRetry.ts: Wraps cloud operations with automatic retry logic for readiness failures, and exports helpers to classify authorization vs. readiness errors.
frontend/src/utils/exportImport.ts: Serializes backend data (journal entries, sessions, stats, rituals) to a JSON export format and provides validation/deserialization helpers for import, handling bigint-safe conversions.
Manages localStorage persistence of knowledge quiz scores, keyed by user principal ID or a guest key, with a React hook for convenient access.
frontend/src/utils/lotusGrowthModel.ts: Calculates visual growth parameters for a lotus flower animation based on total meditation minutes (0–20,000), mapping progress to petal size, layer openness, vividness, particles, and other visual state values across 24 phases.
frontend/src/utils/meditationStorage.ts: Guest-only localStorage utility for storing and managing meditation journal entries, progress data, and rituals for unauthenticated users, including a one-time migration from legacy storage keys.
frontend/src/utils/meditationType.ts: Validates and normalizes a string into a supported MeditationType enum value, falling back to 'mindfulness' for unknown types and treating 'meta' as an alias for 'metta'.
frontend/src/utils/progressRanks.ts: Defines meditation progress rank tiers (Droplet through Infinite Waters) based on total minutes and exports helper functions to retrieve current rank, next rank, and minutes until promotion.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, glow box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for a meditation app, listing completed features (layout adjustments, component refactoring, ReflectionPhase extraction) and architectural notes for ongoing development.
